title: German Sales Appointment Setter
description:
We need some fluent German speaker who can pick up the phone, talk confidently with prospects, and lock in qualified sales meetings for us. All appointments must be confirmed while you are still on the call, with date, time, and any dial-in details captured accurately.

The leads and a brief sales script will be provided; you will handle the rest—calling, qualifying, overcoming basic objections, and making sure the prospect is genuinely interested in a sales conversation. A quick CRM note after each successful booking keeps everything organised.

Because the entire process happens by phone, a clear voice connection and a professional, upbeat manner in German are essential. Familiarity with common CRMs (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce or similar) is a plus, as it helps you drop notes and change lead status efficiently.

Deliverables that mark the job as complete: 
• A minimum agreed-upon number of qualified sales meetings booked each week 
• Accurate contact and meeting details entered in the CRM or shared spreadsheet 
• Brief weekly summary of calls made, meetings secured, and any obstacles encountered 

If you have a track record of turning cold or lukewarm leads into confirmed sales meetings in German, let’s get started.

title: SolidWorks Winkelanpassung mit STEP-Ausgabe
description:
Ich habe mehrere existierende SolidWorks-Modelle, die in ihrer Winkelgeometrie präzise an kundenspezifische Vorgaben angepasst werden müssen. Der Kunde liefert mir dafür detaillierte technische Zeichnungen; auf deren Basis sollst du ausschließlich die Winkelgrade einzelner Komponenten ändern – Form, Reihenfolge oder Anordnung der Teile bleiben unverändert.

Deine Aufgabe gliedert sich in drei Schritte: 
1. Übernehmen und prüfen der bereitgestellten Zeichnungen sowie der aktuellen SolidWorks-Baugruppen. 
2. Exakte Anpassung aller geforderten Winkelgrade inklusive Aktualisierung der zugehörigen Einzelteil- und Baugruppenzeichnungen. 
3. Export der finalen Daten als produktionsreife STEP-Dateien, optimiert für die CNC-Bearbeitung.

Wichtig ist, dass alle Maße, Toleranzen und Bohrbilder nach der Änderung konsistent bleiben und innerhalb von SolidWorks eindeutig bemaßt sind. Bitte arbeite versionssicher (SolidWorks 2020 oder neuer) und dokumentiere jede Änderung kurz im Modell-History-Baum, damit der Fertiger später jeden Schritt nachvollziehen kann.

Wenn du Erfahrung mit ähnlichen Winkelkorrekturen, CNC-gerechten STEP-Exports und sauberer Zeichnungspflege hast, freue ich mich auf deine Unterstützung.

title: Request for SAP CPI / SAP Integration Developer – Dhahran, Saudi Arabia
description:
We are currently executing an Asset Performance Management (APM) project and are seeking an experienced SAP Integration Developer based in Dhahran, Saudi Arabia, to support the development of SAP outbound interfaces.

This is a short-term engagement estimated at approximately 36 man-days. All deliverables will be subject to review and acceptance by our client.
******
- Scope of Work

The selected developer will be responsible for the development, configuration, integration, and testing of SAP interfaces between the Asset Performance Management platform and the Customer SAP environment.

The scope includes:

* Development of SAP objects, including RFCs, BAPIs, IDocs, and custom ABAP developments.
* Configuration and development activities within SAP S/4HANA, SAP PO, and SAP CPI (SAP Integration Suite).
* Development of outbound interfaces from SAP to external applications using SAP CPI.
* Collaboration with the Customer SAP team to ensure compliance with Customer standards, procedures, and governance requirements.
* Participation in integration testing, troubleshooting, and deployment activities.
******
- Working Arrangement

* The developer will be provided with a Customer network ID and Customer-issued laptop.
* Upon onboarding, the developer will work directly within the Customer SAP environment and coordinate closely with the Customer SAP organization.
* The developer will follow all Customer security, development, and change management procedures.
* Integration between SAP PM and the Asset Performance Management platform will be performed subject to Customer stakeholder approvals.
******
- Required Experience

The ideal candidate should possess strong hands-on experience in:

* SAP CPI (SAP Integration Suite)
* ABAP development
* SAP S/4HANA
* SAP PO / PI
* RFC, BAPI, and IDoc development
* REST APIs and SOAP web services
* SAP PM integration
* Enterprise Asset Management integrations

Experience in large-scale industrial, utility, or oil & gas environments is highly desirable.
******
- Response Requested

If you are interested and have suitable resources available, please provide:

* Candidate CV(s)
* Availability and proposed start date from Dhahran
* Rough commercial estimate for the services described above
* Relevant SAP integration project experience

We are looking to mobilize the resource as soon as possible.

title: Poshmark US Shirt Purchase & Forwarding
description:
I have found a specific shirt on Poshmark that I absolutely want, but because I live in Germany the platform blocks me from both buying it and arranging shipment, since they only operate in the USA.
I already have the exact product link and the seller still has the item in stock. What I need now is a reliable US-based freelancer who can complete the entire transaction on my behalf and then forward the parcel to Germany via standard shipping with tracking.

Here is what the job entails: 
• Living in the USA, being able to create an account on Poshmark and making purchases there.
• Buy the shirt for me on Poshmark using the link I will provide. 
• Confirm the order and share a screenshot or receipt so I know the purchase went through. 
• Re-package only if necessary, then ship it to my German address using an affordable standard service (doesnt need to be quick) and provide the tracking number. 
• Let me know the total shipping cost before dispatch so I can reimburse you along with the item price and your fee.

Acceptance criteria:
– I receive a clear proof of purchase from Poshmark. A new picture of the shirt would be nice
– A valid tracking number is shared with me

No preference for express shipping—standard is fine as long as it’s trackable. Looking forward to working with someone who has done mail-forwarding or proxy buying before and can make this process smooth and transparent.

title: Watch Reels & Photos Germany
description:
I need ongoing visual content for a German watch brand and am looking for a creator who can handle both sides of the lens. Each month you will deliver four short, vertical reel videos and twelve polished photos that keep the product front and centre. 

The brief is strictly product-focused—macro shots of the dial, crisp wrist-shots, detail cuts that showcase materials and engineering. All assets will live on social media, so please shoot with Instagram and TikTok optimisation in mind: 9:16 aspect ratio, 15–30 s length, eye-catching first seconds, and colour grading that pops on mobile screens. 

There is no fixed location; studio sessions, city streets, or outdoor set-ups are all fine as long as the watch remains the hero and you can manage lighting. Filming, photography, editing and retouching are part of the single workflow. Familiarity with Premiere Pro or Final Cut for reels and Lightroom or Capture One for stills will make the process smoother. 

Deliver at month’s end: 
• 4 fully edited reel videos (vertical 1080 × 1920, licensed music, colour-graded) 
• 12 high-resolution, retouched photos ready for immediate posting 

Because the watches stay in Germany, I prefer someone already based here or able to shoot locally without delays. When you respond, share links to product-centric reels or photo sets you have produced and outline how you would schedule and execute the monthly shoot. Excited to see what you can create for our brand.

title: Travel Agency Client Database
description:
I need a small, cloud-hosted application that lets our Hurghada-based office keep one clean register of every customer, every trip and every transfer we organise. 

Core flow 
• I enter a new lead or walk-in through a simple form that captures the fields we already use on paper: Tour, Date, Hotel, Room, Name, Phone, Adults, Children (5-10 and 0-5), Country, Pick-up time and Collect point. 
• From the same screen I can confirm the booking and instantly push a pre-filled WhatsApp message to the client that repeats those details and adds our “Trips & Transfers Hussein +20 1066463886 / Have a great trip!” footer. The template must support both the longer and the shorter variant I included in the brief. 
• I can later open any record, update it or cancel it; the customer should also be able to edit their own reservation through a secure link we send them. 

Back office 
A single dashboard should show upcoming trips, allow quick search by name, hotel or date, and let me export a daily pick-up list. Because I chose cloud storage, the data must live online so my colleagues can log in from several PCs in the office without worrying about backups. 

What I’m looking for 
• A ready-to-use, browser-based (or lightweight mobile-friendly) app with an admin login for us and a limited self-service view for clients. 
• Built-in WhatsApp integration—either the business API or reliable third-party gateway—triggered by one click from inside the booking screen. 
• Clean UI; English labels are fine, I will add Polish/Arabic copy myself if needed. 
• Deployment to a low-cost cloud (Firebase, Supabase, AWS, Heroku, your suggestion) plus a short hand-over session so I can manage users and change the message template. 

Acceptance 
The job is done when I can: 
1. Add a booking, see it in the dashboard and edit it. 
2. Send myself a WhatsApp confirmation that contains all fields correctly. 
3. Open the client link and modify the booking as the customer. 
4. Export tomorrow’s pick-up list as CSV or PDF. 

If this sounds straightforward to you and you have already connected apps to WhatsApp, let’s talk about timeline and the best stack for a small operation like ours.

title: Virtual Assistant Support Needed in Bulgaria
description:
Virtual Assistant based in Bulgaria

Description:
I’m relocating to Sofia and need a savvy local Virtual Assistant based anywhere in Bulgaria to help smooth my transition. Your main focus will be on providing advice and secretarial support: answering quick questions about neighborhoods, translating everyday Bulgarian documents, or conversations, and being a reliable person-on-the-ground.

Specific Tasks:
1. Search for furnished rentals in Sofia using platforms (imot.bg, homes.bg, olx.bg) or Facebook groups. Owner-direct listings are preferred where there’s no agency fee.
2. Create a detailed shortlist of suitable apartments with key info such as: rent (+ utilities), size (m²), district, heating type, photos, and links. Flag standout options or suspicious ones.
3. Arrange apartment viewings on June 17 (from 11:30 onwards) and June 18. Space viewings reasonably, and cluster by area for efficiency.

What I’m looking for:
• A furnished one-room or two-room apartment ready by August 1.
• Quiet location with natural light and space for working from home (50–75 m²).
• Districts: Oborishte (top choice), Lozenets, Ivan Vazov; also Krastova vada or Vitosha metro line areas. Avoid far northwest districts like Lyulin.
• Budget: €700/month max (all-inclusive); strong preference for quality €450/month one-rooms.
• Extras like new construction or renovated brick builds with district heating are huge bonuses.

Must-haves:
- Native-level Bulgarian and strong English/German proficiency.
- Organized and proactive problem-solving skills. Bonus if already familiar with local agents/service providers.

title: Countryside School Website
description:
I need a fresh, lightweight website that tells the story of a small countryside school while staying easy for staff to manage on their own. Four public sections have to be in place from day one: a warm school introduction with news about recent activities, a staff gallery, rotating pupil spotlights, and a dedicated “Friends of the School” area.

A simple, browser-based CMS (anything that gives a WYSIWYG feel) must let non-technical admins add or edit text, swap photos, and publish updates without touching code. WordPress, Statamic, October, or a small Laravel/Vue stack are all fine as long as you keep the interface intuitive and secure.

Friends Section requirements 
• Private login for each supporter 
• Internal inbox where any friend or admin can start a mass message to all oder friends, Admin or reply to an existing thread 
• Extra button for admins that blasts the same update to friends via SMS (use Twilio or a comparable gateway) 
• Clean, “serious and nice” design that matches the public site

If part of the spec feels over-engineered, suggest a lighter alternative; function matters more than fancy add-ons. First deliver a working prototype on your own staging server, then migrate it to our shared hosting when we sign off. All source code, documentation for everyday editing, and basic testing instructions are part of the hand-off.

description:

• Natur Sehenswürdigkeiten der Region 
• Typische Produkte, die man sofort mit der Stadt verbindet

title: CoinDCX Expert Picks Fetcher
description:
I need a dependable, end-to-end solution that grabs CoinDCX “Expert Picks” the moment they are published and forwards the payload to a webhook I will provide, formatted as clean JSON. I’m open to either avenue you find most robust: 

• an Android-based mobile app scraper that leverages Accessibility Suite to read the live feed, or 
• a direct API workflow you uncover or engineer that can be polled at a sensible interval. 

Whichever route you choose, the system must handle spotty internet, temporary API errors, and device restarts without losing data or sending duplicates. Think exponential back-off, local caching, and resumable queues.

To prove you actually read this, please start your proposal with the word 'BANANA'. If this word isn't the very first thing I see, your bid will be instantly deleted.

Deliverables 
1. Fully documented source (Kotlin/Java for the scraper or language of choice for the API client) 
2. A deployable build or packaged service ready to run on my Android test device or server 
3. Configuration guide for the webhook endpoint, polling frequency, and any keys or permissions required 
4. A brief report outlining your design decisions plus any optimisation ideas that could tighten latency or reduce battery/network usage

title: Engaging Motion Graphics for Schugle
description:
# Project Title

**Create German motion graphics videos for Schugle — 10s hero loop, 30s reel, 2min explainer**

---

NOTICE: there are bidders for EUR 1450. The budget is USD 1400! (no matter what freelancer makes of it)

---

# Project Description

I am looking for a creative motion graphics / explainer video freelancer to create **three related promotional videos** for **Schugle**, a German web product for teachers.

Website:
[https://schugle.de](https://schugle.de)

Reference page with existing basic tutorial videos:
[https://schugle.de/einstieg](https://schugle.de/einstieg)

The existing videos are only simple “getting started” tutorials. This new project is different. I need **promotional / explanatory clips** that make the idea of Schugle more attractive, memorable and emotionally clear.

The current website is rather factual. The videos should make the idea more engaging, while still feeling calm, credible, professional and suitable for schools.

---

# About Schugle

Schugle helps teachers create, formulate, structure and revise **Förderpläne** using AI.

A key idea is that sensitive pupil data should be protected before AI processing. Real pupil names should not go into the AI. Schugle works with protected placeholders instead.

The emotional idea is not “generic AI for education”. It is more specific:

**From scattered teacher notes and time pressure to clear, usable Förderplan language — with privacy protection built in.**

The video should help communicate:

* less writing effort for teachers
* clearer Förderplan structure
* AI-supported formulation
* protection of sensitive pupil data
* calm, trustworthy support for everyday school work

---

# Deliverables

I need three related videos with the same look and feel:

1. **10-second video**

 * Also usable as a silent hero/background loop on the Schugle website
 * Should work without voiceover
 * Should be visually calm enough for a website hero area

2. **30-second video**

 * Promotional/social/reel version
 * Suitable for website, LinkedIn, social media or short ads

3. **2-minute explainer video**

 * More detailed explanation of the Schugle idea
 * May reuse material from the 10s and 30s videos

All three clips must feel like one coherent visual campaign.

---

# Language

The videos are for a German product.

* German on-screen text is required.
* I may provide or change German voiceover/audio later.
* The freelancer does not necessarily need to record German voiceover.
* However, the freelancer must understand the purpose of the German text and design around it.

For non-German speakers:

**“Schugle” is pronounced like “shoe” + the “gle” from “Google”.**

The name is inspired by **“Schule”** and **“gemeinsam”**. This does not need to be explained directly in the video, but the feeling should fit: school-related, supportive, structured and collaborative — without generic school clichés.

---

# Important Style Direction

Please do **not** use generic education stock footage such as:

* happy teachers
* smiling children
* classroom clichés
* chalkboards
* graduation caps
* cartoon children
* generic “school app” imagery

Schugle should feel:

* professional
* calm
* intelligent
* trustworthy
* modern
* helpful
* suitable for schools and teachers

As a reference for tone and audience fit, please also look at https://foerder-fokus.de. I like that it speaks to a German teacher / Förderpraxis audience in a calm, practical and credible way — for example around the ideas of less paperwork, more focus on the child, structure, overview and professional support. Schugle should not copy this site or its visuals, and Schugle is a different product, but the videos should aim for a similarly trustworthy German school-sector feeling, with a slightly more modern and distinctive Schugle look.

I am especially interested in visual ideas such as:

* scattered notes becoming structured Förderplan text
* anonymised placeholders replacing real names
* teacher workload becoming clearer and lighter
* AI support shown subtly, not as flashy sci-fi
* the Schugle tilted “g” icon becoming a visual motif
* text fragments transforming into calm, usable plan language

Possible visual direction:

**Messy notes → structured thoughts → protected placeholders → AI-assisted formulation → clear Förderplan.**

---

# Brand Assets

The Schugle logo and tilted **“g”** icon are available as SVG files.

These should be used as part of the visual identity. Creative, subtle animation of the logo/icon is welcome.

The videos should have a consistent visual language that could also influence a future revision of the Schugle website.

---

# Editable Text, Audio and Rights

This is very important.

German text and audio must remain editable after project completion. I must be able to change German text or audio later without recreating the whole video.

Therefore, the freelancer must deliver:

1. Final exported videos with text.
2. Clean versions without text, where appropriate.
3. Editable source/project files.
4. German text as editable text layers, not flattened or permanently baked into the only final files.
5. Separate audio files/tracks for music, sound effects and voiceover placeholders.
6. Subtitle/caption files if subtitles are used, preferably SRT or VTT.
7. A list of all fonts, stock assets, icons, templates and music used, including license terms.
8. Written confirmation that I may edit, adapt, reuse and publish the videos for Schugle marketing, website hero backgrounds, social media, ads and future website revisions.

Please state clearly which software and editable formats you will provide, for example:

* After Effects
* Premiere Pro
* DaVinci Resolve
* Final Cut
* Blender
* Figma
* Canva
* other

Final MP4 files alone are not enough.

---

# What I Expect in Your Proposal

Please do not send a generic proposal.

Before bidding, please review:

* [https://schugle.de](https://schugle.de)
* [https://schugle.de/einstieg](https://schugle.de/einstieg)

In your proposal, please answer the following:

1. In your own words, what does Schugle do?
2. What do you think is the central emotional idea of these videos?
3. What is one original visual concept for the 10-second hero clip?
4. How would you use the Schugle logo or tilted “g” icon?
5. What visual style do you suggest?
6. Which tools/software will you use?
7. Which editable source files will you deliver?
8. How will you make sure German text remains editable?
9. What is included in your fixed price?
10. What is excluded?
11. How many revision rounds are included?
12. Do you use templates, AI tools, stock assets, custom animation, or a mix?
13. Please include relevant portfolio examples.

Generic proposals that do not mention Förderpläne, anonymisation/privacy, or the specific purpose of Schugle will not be considered.

---

# Budget

Budget: **up to $1,500 USD fixed price**

This is a fully funded project. I am ready to award quickly to the right freelancer.

Payment will be through Freelancer.com milestones, released after approved deliverables.

Please only bid if you can deliver a polished result within this budget.

---

# Suggested Milestones

I suggest the following milestone structure, but I am open to your proposal:

| Milestone | Deliverable | Amount |
| --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------: | -----: |
| 1 | Creative concept, moodboard, one style frame, rough storyboard | $200 |
| 2 | 10-second hero/background clip | $300 |
| 3 | 30-second promotional/reel version | $300 |
| 4 | 2-minute explainer first version | $450 |
| 5 | Final revisions, clean exports, editable source files, rights confirmation | $200 |

Total: **$1,450**

---

# Final Notes

I am not looking for a generic school advertisement.

I want someone who understands the specific idea of Schugle and can turn it into a clear, attractive visual story.

The right result should make teachers feel:

**“This could save me time, help me formulate better Förderpläne, and handle sensitive data responsibly.”**

title: Investment Platform Web Application -- 2
description:
We are looking for an experienced web developer or development team to help build an investment platform web application. The platform will be designed to provide a seamless and secure environment for users to invest in various assets, view portfolio performance, and track market data in real-time.

This is a full-stack web application, and we expect the developer to have experience in both front-end and back-end development. The project requires integration with financial data providers for real-time stock/asset prices, a user-friendly interface, secure account management, and investment tracking tools.

Key Features:
User Registration and Authentication: Secure sign-up/login with multi-factor authentication.
Investment Dashboard: A clean, user-friendly dashboard where users can view their portfolio, track investment performance, and see relevant market data.
Real-Time Data: Integration with APIs for real-time financial data (stock prices, asset values, etc.).
Transaction History: A feature that allows users to view their past transactions, including deposits, withdrawals, and investments.
Security Features: Strong encryption for user data and financial transactions.
Payment Integration: Integration with a payment gateway for deposits and withdrawals.
Admin Panel: An admin dashboard for managing user accounts, transactions, and viewing overall platform performance.
Required Skills:
Full-stack development experience, with strong skills in React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB (or a similar database), and REST APIs.
Previous experience building financial, investment, or trading platforms is highly desirable.
Strong proficiency with security practices, especially around user data and payment processing.
Familiarity with financial APIs and how to integrate them into the platform.
Knowledge of responsive design to ensure the platform works well on both desktop and mobile devices.
Ability to work collaboratively and meet project deadlines.
Deliverables:
A fully functional web application that meets the requirements above.
Documentation on the development process, the tech stack used, and instructions for deployment.
A user manual for basic platform functionality.

Important Notes:
Please share your portfolio with previous projects related to web application development, especially financial platforms or investment tools.
We are looking for a developer who is reliable, communicates clearly, and can provide updates as milestones are achieved.
Experience with building secure, scalable applications is crucial.

If you're passionate about building something impactful in the finance space and you have the necessary skills, we’d love to hear from you. Feel free to share your approach to how you’d tackle this project and any initial thoughts on how you’d structure the platform.

This is strictly an educational micro-engagement; no full game development is required. I have set aside $25 for the session, so please tailor the scope accordingly and feel free to propose the most efficient way to cover the material within that limit.

title: 2-Layer Automotive PCB Design: Multi-Port USB Charger & Data Bypass Module (JLCPCB/LCSC Optimized)
description:
Hello,
I need a schematic and 2-layer PCB layout for an automotive-grade Multi-Port USB Charger box. It's a hardware-only project (no firmware/software).

Key Goals:
Target Manufacturing Cost: Under €15 per unit (PCBA) for a 100-unit run.
Component Selection: Must use low-cost, highly integrated standard ICs (e.g., Injoinic, Southchip) from LCSC/JLCPCB.
PCB Size: Approx. 65 x 40 mm or smaller (Open-Frame).
Mounting: M3 screw holes in the corners with a strict 6mm diameter keep-out zone.

Interfaces & Topology
 Input: 12V/24V DC + 1x SMD USB port (Data-Input from car radio).
Outputs ($90^\circ$ Shrouded JST PH 2.0 connectors):
Port 1 & 2 (USB-A): Shared Buck-Regler (QC3.0 / Apple 2.4A, max. 24W total).
Port 3 (USB-C): Shared USB-PD 3.0 / QC3.0 combo controller.
Port 4 (USB-C Combo): Shares power with Port 3 (max. 30W-40W total) + passive $D+/D-$ data bypass from the Radio-Input for Android Auto/CarPlay.

Safety & Protection (Mandatory)
Input: On-board Car-Mini-Fuse (7.5A/10A) + TVS Load-Dump protection (ISO 7637-2).
EMC: LC filter according to CISPR 25 (No radio interference).
Output: Individual PTC/Polyfuse + ESD protection (15 kV) on all JST ports.

Deliverables: 
Complete Schematics & PCB Layout (2-Layer, FR4, 1.6mm, $\ge35\mu m$ copper).
Production files: Gerbers, CPL (Pick&Place), BOM (LCSC part numbers), and a 3D STEP file.

Please share your previous automotive/power delivery PCB designs. Looking forward to your bids!

title: B2B SaaS Google Ads long tail-keyword Strategy Sparring
description:
Here's an overview so you can judge whether this is a fit.

THE PROJECT (Phase 1 = a paid test sprint)

I'm launching a bootstrapped new B2B SaaS product and want to validate it through Google Ads, using a long-tail, low-competition keyword strategy: many specific, low-volume search terms (niche professional intent), each pointing to its own hyper-specific dedicated landing page. The bet is low CPC + high intent rather than broad, expensive head terms.


How the funnel works (so the goal makes sense):

- Ad → a dedicated landing page for that niche
- On the page, the visitor can try an interactive tool; if it resonates, they create a free account = a "signup"

That signup is the conversion event you'd optimize toward. (What happens after signup — paid conversion — lives in our internal system, isn't visible at ad level, and isn't reliably measurable in a short test anyway.)


TWO PARALLEL LANGUAGE LEGS, EQUAL BUDGET (so we can compare them cleanly):

- German-speaking markets (Germany, Austria, German-speaking Switzerland) — ~€1,000
- English-speaking markets — ~€1,000 — preferably UK + Ireland (closest fit for our expansion path, and cleaner auction economics than the US on these terms)

THE ONE KPI YOU'D OPTIMIZE: Cost-per-Signup

Deliberately the single target, because it bundles everything: cheap junk clicks won't produce signups, so they won't help your number — it forces low CPC and high intent at once.

Primary goal: lowest possible cost-per-signup.
Read floor (not a goal): ~25–30 signups per leg over the sprint, so the data is meaningful. Beyond that floor, lower cost-per-signup always beats more signups — this is a learning test, not a volume push.
Explicitly NOT targets: CPC alone, impressions, clicks, or raw volume above the floor.

A SECOND, EQUALLY IMPORTANT READ: is this scalable?

The €1k isn't just "how cheap is a signup" — it also has to tell me whether there's enough long-tail demand to build this into a scalable mid-term channel, or whether we hit a ceiling fast. So alongside cost-per-signup I'll want your read on:

Impression share & lost-IS (budget) per cluster — how much of available demand are we capturing at €1k?
Total available search volume vs. what we're buying — how big is the pool?
Whether cost-per-signup stays stable as spend increases (headroom) or climbs (saturation). 

I'D LIKE TO SPLIT THE WORK INTO A CLEAR SEQUENCE

WS-0 — Keyword Strategy & Pull (first, standalone):

Strategy sparring (open): given the KPI above — low cost-per-signup, high active intent, NOT raw volume — what types of keyword clusters would you go after here? I have a working hypothesis (~7 clusters across a few audiences), but I'm genuinely looking for your expertise to find high-intent, low-cost-per-signup clusters I've missed — keyword themes outside my framing are exactly what I want to surface. The only filter: sharp active intent over raw volume. This is a discussion, not just a list.
Pull & structure: Keyword Planner research across both languages (DE + EN), real search volumes + bid ranges, organized into the agreed clusters — including your read on the volume/scalability question above.

WS-1+ — Build & Ops (only if WS-0 validates volume): account setup, conversion tracking, campaign/ad-group structure, RSAs, negative keywords, pacing, daily reporting against agreed thresholds. ~4–5 week run.

The reason for the split: the keyword data decides whether the campaign is viable at all, so I'd like to start there before committing to the full build.
WHAT I OWN (not delegated): landing pages, niche strategy, and the go/no-go decisions. What I'm looking for from you: the full Google Ads execution.
One note: I've kept the product itself deliberately light here. I'm happy to share full product and user-journey insights after a mutual NDA — that gives you everything you need to plan the campaign properly, while protecting the underlying product. (Totally standard; happy to sort the NDA before we go deeper.)


TWO THINGS I'D APPRECIATE FROM YOU AT THIS STAGE:

1) A quick gut-check: is this a project you'd take on, and are you comfortable with the sub-project split and this sequence (WS-0 first, then Build & Ops)?
2) A first quote for WS-0, plus a rough ballpark indicator for the rest of the Phase-1 build & ops, so I can plan.

Scoped to the Phase-1 test for now — but if it works, clear potential to continue well beyond it (scaling, more geographies).

title: Dezentrale Börse mit Liquiditätspool
description:
Ich plane den Aufbau einer dezentralen Börse, die einen eigenen Liquiditätspool bereitstellt und sofort einsatzbereit ist. Im ersten Schritt liegt der Fokus auf einem funktionsfähigen Kernsystem, das Swaps ermöglicht und Ein- sowie Auszahlungen in den Pool sicher verarbeitet. 

Was ich erwarte 
• Entwicklung der notwendigen Smart Contracts inklusive gründlicher Tests 
• Einrichtung der Pool-Logik (Einzahlung, Auszahlung, Gebührenverwaltung) 
• Einfache Web-Oberfläche zum Verbinden der Wallet, Durchführen von Swaps und Verwalten der Liquidität 
• Saubere Dokumentation, damit ich Änderungen oder Erweiterungen leicht nachvollziehen kann 

Technische Leitplanken 
Die Wahl der Blockchain ist noch offen – Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain oder Solana kommen infrage. Bitte schlage mir die sinnvollste Option in Hinblick auf Gas-Kosten, Community-Support und Sicherheit vor. 

Ausblick 
Nach dem MVP möchte ich Zusatzfunktionen wie Staking, Yield Farming Fiat Defi oder Lending modular nachrüsten. Wenn du Erfahrung damit hast, erwähne das gern, es ist jedoch kein Muss für den jetzigen Meilenstein. 

Worauf ich Wert lege 
– Sauberer, prüfbarer Code (Solidity, Rust oder Vyper je nach Chain) 
– Best-Practices beim Thema Security (Reentrancy-Schutz, Upgradability, Audits)

title: ESP32 Camera PCB Design
description:
Project overview:
I'm a student working on a research project — a system of small, cube-shaped, battery-powered cameras that mount in a grid layout for multi-perspective image capture (used for Gaussian Splatting reconstruction). Each camera "cell" needs to know its position in the grid, be easy to install by non-experts, and communicate over I2C to a central grid controller.

I need a freelance PCB designer to take my written specification (attached) and existing prototype photos, and produce two finished PCB designs, ready for fabrication:

Board 1 — Grid Cam node (main camera board)
Built around an ESP32-S3R8 module. Required features:


Camera connector (compatible with OV3660-style camera module)
Onboard microphone
Speaker output via amplifier + SPK connector
8MB flash memory
Boot & Reset buttons
RGB LED (front-facing)
microSD card slot
Battery charging circuit (single-cell Li-ion/LiPo), including dual charge current support, with JST connector for the battery
Power delivery via a magnetic pogo-pin style connector (for grid mounting)
Must ALSO remain programmable/powered via USB-C
Needs a clean solution to avoid conflicts when both the magnetic connector and USB-C are supplying power at the same time (this is the trickiest part of the design — please confirm you have handled power-source arbitration/OR-ing circuits before)
4-pin JST connector for mounting (VCC, GND, SDA, SCL) — this is how it talks to the grid controller
Physical switch to connect/disconnect the battery
Two battery status LEDs (red = charging, green = fully charged)
Voltage divider circuit to measure battery voltage from the microcontroller
Optional/nice-to-have: IR LEDs, ambient light sensor
Open question I'd like your input on: onboard antenna vs. antenna IC vs. external antenna connector for the ESP32 module — please advise based on the cube enclosure size (~40x40x40mm)


Board 2 — Grid controller board
Built around a Seeed XIAO ESP32-C3, connected to 8x PCA9548A I2C multiplexer breakout boards, with solder pads for each of the outgoing I2C connections (one per grid cell it connects to).

Deliverables expected:


Full schematic (KiCad or EasyEDA preferred; Altium acceptable if you provide native + PDF export)
Complete PCB layout for both boards
Bill of Materials (BOM) with sourceable part numbers (JLCPCB/LCSC preferred parts a plus, for easy assembly ordering)
Gerber files + drill files ready to send to a fab house
Brief write-up explaining the power arbitration circuit and antenna decision, so I can understand and defend the design choices in my thesis


Reference material attached: Full written specification PDF (component list, sketches, current prototype board layout with pin diagram, photos of the existing 3D-printed prototype enclosure).

About me / context: This is a university student research project (not a commercial product), so budget is limited, but the design needs to actually work reliably since I'll be building and testing multiple units. I'm not an electronics engineer myself, so I'll rely on you to flag any part of my spec that's impractical or needs revision — clear communication matters more to me than working with someone purely fast/cheap.

I have already tried to make a design which does not have all the components and the design needs a lot of improvement but I am attaching the files just for your reference.

title: Smart Parking Disc Modification -- 2
description:
Project Brief: Stealth-Modified Automatic Parking Disc (Certified for Public Road Use in Germany)

Project Goal:
I want to technically modify a certified electronic parking disc approved for use in Germany (must have an official certification number and ECE approval), so that it continues to automatically update the displayed parking time even after the vehicle has been parked. This modification must be invisible and undetectable from the outside, meaning the device must look and behave like the original product to any observer or parking enforcement officer.

Background:
Standard electronic parking discs are designed to detect when a vehicle is turned off and then freeze the display at the next permissible half-hour mark. This allows parking enforcement to determine how long the car has been parked.

However, I want the parking disc to be modified so that it continues updating the time, effectively simulating that the vehicle has just been parked — regardless of how long it has been stationary. This means that the parking time shown on the display always remains within the legal limit, allowing me to park indefinitely without receiving a ticket.

What needs to be done:
	•	The base must be an officially approved German electronic parking disc, such as those from Park Lite, Needit, or similar.
	•	I can ship the device to you from Germany, or you can order it yourself (I’ll cover the cost).
	•	The device must be technically modified so that:
	•	The displayed time continues to update automatically, even after the engine is turned off.
	•	It always displays the next allowed parking time, rounded up to the next full or half hour according to German regulations.

Example Functionality:
	•	If the car is parked at 13:45, the disc should show 14:00.
	•	If parked at 14:00, it should show 14:30.
	•	If parked at 14:31, it should show 15:00, and so on.
	•	After that, the device should continue to update the display regularly, so it always appears as if the car was parked just moments ago.

Key Requirements:
	•	The modification must be completely undetectable from the outside. The parking disc should look and behave exactly like an unmodified, legally approved product.
	•	The functionality must be fully automatic. No user interaction should be needed after parking.
	•	No visible alterations (e.g., wires, unusual controls, abnormal movement patterns).
	•	Power should remain efficient — preferably still battery-powered or with a hidden upgrade that doesn’t draw attention.

Ideal Freelancer Profile:
I’m looking for someone with experience in electronics, microcontroller programming (e.g., Arduino), or embedded systems. Ideally, you’ve worked with consumer electronics, automotive modifications, or smart devices before. Both functionality and stealth are equally important for this project.

⸻

Let me know if you have questions or need specific details (such as device models). Looking forward to collaborating!

title: German Audio Adaptation of Children’s Stories
description:
I have a set of short English scripts for children that now need a complete German treatment. Your first step will be to translate each story into clear, age-appropriate Standard German, keeping the gentle tone and playful word-choice intact.

Once the text is ready, move into ElevenLabs Studio, select and refine a mix of children’s and adult voices that feel lively yet natural, and rebuild the narration there. I will provide background sound files from the English version; simply import them and line them up beneath the new German voices in ElevenLabs so we retain the same atmosphere.

Deliverables
• Final mastered audio for every story (WAV or high-quality MP3) 
• The matched German scripts in a single document 
• ElevenLabs project links or voice settings presets so I can reproduce the sessions if needed 

I will review the work for translation accuracy, voice suitability, clean timing with the supplied sound effects, and overall listening quality before sign-off. If you enjoy bringing stories to life for kids and know your way around ElevenLabs, this should be a smooth, fun project.

title: Hilfe für Stripe-Zahlungsoptionen und Rechnungen
description:
Ich möchte mein bestehendes Stripe-Konto optimieren und brauche dabei vor allem Unterstützung, um die Zahlungsoptionen konfigurieren zu können und Rechnungen ordentlich aufzusetzen. Mir geht es darum, die Einstellungen im Dashboard wirklich zu verstehen, Fehlerquellen zu vermeiden und alle nötigen Schritte sauber durchzuführen.

Das erwarte ich von dir:
• Ein kurzer Vorab-Check meines aktuellen Accounts, damit du einen Überblick über die vorhandenen Einstellungen bekommst. 
• Eine gemeinsame Online-Session, in der du mir Schritt für Schritt zeigst, wo und wie ich die gewünschten Zahlungsarten aktiviere – ob Kreditkarten, SEPA-Lastschriften oder Apple Pay/Google Pay letztlich genutzt werden, entscheiden wir dabei gemeinsam. 
• Klare Erläuterungen zu Best Practices in Sachen Sicherheit, Gebühren und Compliance. 
• Eine kompakte Zusammenfassung (Stichpunkte oder Kurzdoku), damit ich die vorgenommenen Änderungen später leicht nachvollziehen kann.

Du solltest dich mit dem Stripe-Dashboard, den relevanten API-Optionen und idealerweise auch mit europäischen Zahlungsanforderungen auskennen. Ein freundlicher Kommunikationsstil, flüssiges Deutsch und die Bereitschaft, meine Fragen live zu beantworten, sind mir wichtig. 

Wenn du Lust hast, mich einmalig durch diesen Prozess zu führen und sicherzustellen, dass alles korrekt konfiguriert ist, freue ich mich auf deine Nachricht samt kurzer Angabe zu deiner Stripe-Erfahrung und deinem zeitlichen Vorschlag für den Call.

title: Interior Designer / FF&E + Finish CDs — 4-Unit Gut Reno (Architect Already Engaged)
description:
Summary
I'm a developer running a 4-unit residential gut renovation (interior + exterior scope) in Jersey City, NJ. The architect of record is engaged and producing the permit/structural CD set. I need an interior designer to own the finish-level design and documentation that layers on top.
This is an execution role, not a blank-canvas role. The structural decisions are largely made. I need someone who designs to budget, documents precisely, and ships on schedule.

Scope of deliverables:

Finish plans + finish schedules (flooring, tile, paint, wall treatments) — per unit and common areas
Decorative lighting layout / RCP, coordinated into the architect's electrical set before MEP rough-in
Millwork & casework elevations + details (kitchens, vanities, built-ins, closets) at fabrication-ready scale
Tile setting-out / layout drawings for wet areas
Plumbing fixture + hardware specs and locations
FF&E schedule (manufacturer, model, dimensions, finish, qty, lead time, allowance) — purchase-ready
Exterior finish direction (façade materials, color, entry, lighting)

How I work:

I work from the architect's CAD backgrounds as the governing base — no independently redrawn dimensions.
Designs are built to a per-category budget allowance. Renders are for intent; the schedule is the deliverable.
Millwork drawings need to be detailed enough to quote and fabricate from — several vendors are overseas, so the drawings have to stand on their own.
I expect a defined deliverables list with dates, staged milestones, and clear payment gates tied to delivery.

You're a fit if you:

Have done multi-unit residential or full gut renos, not just single-room staging
Can produce a real FF&E schedule and millwork CDs (please share samples of both)
Are comfortable coordinating with an architect of record and overseas vendors
Move quickly and hit committed dates

To apply, send:

A finish CD set and an FF&E schedule from a past project (samples required — applications without them won't be reviewed)
Your typical turnaround for a deliverable package this size
Your rate structure (hourly vs. fixed per phase) and earliest start date
One sentence on how you keep finish drawings coordinated with an architect's permit set

Start is immediate for the right person. I value speed and precision equally—tell me how you deliver both.

title: App-freier Trennungsalarm entwickeln
description:
Ich brauche ein simples Zweigeräte-System, das ohne Smartphone oder App funktioniert und einen “Separations-Alarm” auslöst, sobald sich Sender und Empfänger mehr als etwa 10 Meter voneinander entfernen. 

Was ich mir vorstelle 
• Gerät A sitzt per Kabelbinder am Kameradreibein. 
• Gerät B steckt in meiner Hosentasche. 
• Alarmart ist flexibel – Ton oder Vibration ist beides in Ordnung, Hauptsache eindeutig wahrnehmbar. 

Rahmenbedingungen 
– Keine Kopplung mit Handy, keine App, keine Sprachmenüs: Das System wird ständig von unterschiedlichen Personen, welche nicht die selbe Sprache sprechen, an wechselnden Orten genutzt. 
– Reichweite auf rund 10 m einstellbar. 
– Einfache, robuste Bauweise, sofort einsatzbereit nach dem Einschalten. 
– Batteriebetrieb oder aufladbar per USB, mindestens einen Arbeitstag Laufzeit. 

Lieferumfang, den ich erwarte 
1. Funktionsfähiger Prototyp (2 × Gerät) inklusive Gehäuse. 
2. Kurzanleitung ohne Textwände – wenige Piktogramme reichen. 
3. Stückliste mit Bezugsquellen, damit ich später weitere Sets nachbauen lassen kann. 

Wenn Sie bereits ein fertiges Produkt haben, das alle Punkte erfüllt, freue ich mich über ein Angebot. Andernfalls bauen Sie mir bitte einen einfachen, zuverlässigen Prototypen. Schreiben Sie kurz, wie Sie die Distanzmessung lösen (z. B. UWB, BLE-RSSI, RF), welche Stromversorgung Sie planen und welchen Fertigstellungszeitraum Sie benötigen.

To help you scope the job, here is the data set: 400 bookings, full sets of receipts and invoices, and customer-vendor profiles. The Lexware export files can be provided in CSV, PDF, or XML; let me know which format you prefer for a smooth import workflow.

• Your direct experience with both Lexware and Sage migrations

• A fixed-price quote for the entire migration

title: Software-Trainer / Einweiser (m/w/d) für Waagensoftware (Minijob, 603 € fest, 100% Remote)
description:
Über das Projekt / Die Aufgabe

Wir vertreiben eine spezialisierte und intuitiv zu bedienende Waagensoftware für gewerbliche Nutzer. Um unseren Kunden den optimalen Start zu ermöglichen, suchen wir einen zuverlässigen Studenten (m/w/d), der die Ersteinweisung der Anwender übernimmt.
Es handelt sich um eine dauerhafte, regelmäßige Aufgabe auf festen Minijob-Basis (603 € / Monat). Der zeitliche Aufwand liegt bei ca. 8 Schulungen pro Woche à 45 Minuten zzgl. minimaler Vor-/Nachbereitung (Gesamtaufwand: ca. 7,5 Stunden pro Woche). Die Schulungen finden komplett online statt.

Zeitrahmen für die Schulungen:

• Die Termine finden flexibel nach Absprache mit den Kunden statt.
• Wichtig: Sie müssen die Schulungen werktags (Montag bis Freitag) im Zeitraum zwischen 08:00 und 17:00 Uhr flexibel in Ihren Alltag integrieren können.

Ihre Aufgaben:

• Durchführung von kurzen Online-Schulungen (ca. 45 Minuten via MS Teams oder Zoom).
• Erklärung der Grundfunktionen unserer Waagensoftware an die Anwender.
• Beantwortung einfacher, grundlegender Verständnisfragen während der Einweisung.
• Kurze Dokumentation/Abhaken der durchgeführten Termine in unserer Liste.

Das bringen Sie mit (Ihr Profil):

• Zeitliche Verfügbarkeit: Sie haben tagsüber unter der Woche (8–17 Uhr) regelmäßig freie Zeitfenster für die Durchführung der Termine.
• Empathie & extreme Geduld: Unsere Software wird von „einfachen Leuten“ (z. B. Logistik-, Lager- oder Produktionsmitarbeitern) bedient. Sie können technische Abläufe auf Augenhöhe und komplett ohne kompliziertes IT-Fachchinesisch erklären.
• Perfekte Deutschkenntnisse: Fließendes, fehlerfreies und klares Deutsch in Wort und Schrift ist zwingende Voraussetzung.
• Zuverlässigkeit: Die Termine finden während der regulären Arbeitszeiten unserer Kunden statt. Pünktlichkeit steht an oberster Stelle.
• Eine gesunde technische Affinität, um sich schnell in unsere Benutzeroberfläche einzuarbeiten.
• Fähigkeit zur Kommunikation mit deutschen Kunden sowie englischsprachigen Entwicklern zur Sicherstellung eines reibungslosen Austauschs zwischen beiden Parteien.

Was wir bieten:

• Faires, festes Einkommen: Sie erhalten das Fixum von 603 € jeden Monat verlässlich als Minijob (entspricht einem attraktiven Stundenlohn von ca. 18,50 €).
• Kein Abrechnungsstress: Keine Abrechnung nach Minuten oder Einzeltickets. Das Kontingent ist monatlich fest planbar.
• 100% Remote & flexibel: Arbeiten Sie bequem von zu Hause aus. Die Termine lassen sich hervorragend um Ihren Vorlesungsplan herumplanen.
• Gründliche Einarbeitung: Wir zeigen Ihnen die Software vorab im Detail, sodass Sie absolut sicher in die ersten Schulungen gehen.

Wie Sie sich bewerben:

Bitte senden Sie uns eine kurze Nachricht mit Ihrem Hintergrund und einer kurzen Angabe, warum Ihnen das Erklären von Software an Nicht-IT-Spezialisten Spaß macht und wie Ihre Verfügbarkeit im Zeitfenster von 8 bis 17 Uhr aussieht. Wir freuen uns auf Sie!
Damit ist das Inserat absolut trennscharf formuliert. Viel Erfolg bei der Auswahl! Wenn Sie Unterstützung beim Erstellen eines kurzen Leitfadens oder einer Checkliste für den Studenten für die erste Einarbeitung benötigen, lassen Sie es mich einfach wissen.

Ringmetall Group, an international industrial manufacturing company headquartered in Germany, is looking for an experienced Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Consultant and Developer to support our US operations, primarily Berger US in Birmingham, Alabama.
We are seeking a highly skilled independent freelancer who can act as a trusted advisor and technical expert for ongoing Business Central support, enhancements, integrations, troubleshooting, and future projects.
While remote work is acceptable, candidates located in Alabama (preferably Birmingham) are strongly preferred for occasional on-site workshops and business meetings.

Ringmetall Group operates globally and is currently standardizing and optimizing its ERP landscape. Our US subsidiary operates Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central and several connected business applications within a manufacturing environment.
We are looking for a long-term partner rather than a one-time contractor.

title: InDesign Professional for Book Formatting
description:
Book Design with Quotes (InDesign) – Proof Copy -ITS SIMPLE!
I’m looking for a top freelancer—Top Rated—to design and format a book structured as follows: half of the book is text/general knowledge, and the other half consists of quotes.
Basic book specs
• Working file: Word document
• Final delivery: fully formatted InDesign book
• Trim size: 5.25 × 8 inches
• Length: approx. 400 pages with five images
• Paper: cream paper
• Printing: black
Design style
Modern, elegant, and rather minimalist—clean, clearly structured, and highly readable.
Scope
Everything must be designed and formatted: page numbers, headers, bullets/lists, body text, headings, table of contents, etc.
However, we start with the central “hook” of the book: the quote page, where the quote is paired with its context. This quote page must be designed first, and we will derive the entire book design from it.
Project scope
This offer applies to one book only (the proof copy). After that, I will be looking for a freelancer to format my entire series in the same design: 45 books in German and 45 in English, each as paperback and hardcover, plus one eBook version for German and one for English. That would be a separate order.
Expectations
• Daily updates
• Reliability is mandatory
• High creativity and strong design skills
If you’re suitable and a top freelancer, please message me. I will then send you three files (two screenshots):
1. A screenshot showing the page where you can find the quote and its context.
2. The screenshot is meant to show how the page can be composed—how the quote and the context can be positioned in relation to each other. But you can also do it in a completely different way. I’ll leave that to you.
3. The Word file you’ll work with.

We design the quote page first, and the design of the entire book is derived from that.

To be absolutely clear: it is necessary to create a sample first—the quote page. This sample will not be paid upfront; I will not pay for something I cannot use. Once we have a suitable sample, the full project will be started and the sample will be included and paid as part of that order. That is exactly why we do the sample first: I don’t want to start dozens of orders and then cancel them again. Therefore, it is essential to begin with this one-page sample!

If you’re interested, please get in touch.

Budget: 100 plus 25 Tip

Note: The bid you submit will be the one I use—no other bid.

The purpose of the project is to create a reusable platform that allows predefined Excel worksheet functions to execute arbitrary Python code without requiring the user to install Python or perform any technical configuration.

title: YouTube Workshop-Video erstellen
description:
Ich betreibe einen Online-Kurs zum Thema Affiliate-Marketing und möchte ein kompaktes Workshop-Video für YouTube produzieren. In dem Clip soll ein kleiner, aber wertvoller Ausschnitt aus dem Kurs – die Grundlagen des Affiliate-Marketings – Schritt für Schritt gezeigt werden, damit Zuschauer unmittelbar Nutzen ziehen und anschließend Interesse am vollständigen Kurs entwickeln.

So könnten sie kostenlos verstehen, wo gerade der Fehler liegt, warum aus Posts keine Anfragen entstehen und wie man genau da ansetzt. 

Das würde den Einstieg viel greifbarer machen und wahrscheinlich auch mehr Vertrauen aufbauen.

Was ich benötige:
• Skript oder Ablaufplan, der den Lerneinstieg klar strukturiert 
• Screen Recording mit professionellem deutschsprachigem Voice-over (kein Animations- oder Live-Action-Stil) 
• Dezente Intro-/Outro-Einblendungen, die zum Kurs verlinken 
• Saubere Nachbearbeitung (Tonangleichung, Cuts, einfache Grafikeinblendungen) 
• Fertige Datei in gängigem YouTube-Format, inklusive aller verwendeten Rohdateien

Wichtig ist mir dein nachweisbares Erfahrung sprofil in ähnlichen Projekten zeig mir gern Beispiele, bei denen du Wissen über Bildschirmaufnahmen vermittelt hast. Wenn dir Funnel-Logik, Call-to-Action-Platzierung und YouTube-SEO vertraut sind, erwähne das bitte ebenfalls.

Ich freue mich auf deine Idee, wie wir den Mehrwert prägnant und überzeugend verpacken!

title: Customize Mechanical 3D-Printable Puzzle Box
description:
Project Type: Customization of an existing 3D printable model
Objective: Create a personalized, romantic version of the original Alchemist's Cube Puzzle Combination Box while preserving the original puzzle mechanics and printability.

1. Project Overview

The objective is to customize the existing Alchemist's Cube Puzzle Combination Box available on Printables:

https://www.printables.com/model/1088843-alchemists-cube-puzzle-combination-box

This project is not intended to redesign the outside of the puzzle. The original mechanism, assembly process and user experience should remain intact wherever possible. The modifications focus on personalization, aesthetics and increasing the puzzle complexity through additional false keypaths.

2. Project Objectives

The customization consists of the following major tasks:

+ Understand the existing model and puzzle mechanism.
A) Create four customized outer combination wheels.
B) Personalize the top decoration.
C) Redesign decorative elements with a romantic theme.
D) Increase puzzle difficulty by introducing additional false keypaths.

Final Milestones below-
The Project must be completed by the 18.7.26

3. Familiarization with the Existing Model

Before beginning the customization, please study the original model and understand its assembly and mechanical operation.

The available files include:

Base
Core

overall puzzle operation
wheel interaction

relationship between decorative and mechanical parts

Unless explicitly specified below, the original puzzle mechanics should remain unchanged.

4. Task A – Custom Combination Wheels
Base Model

Outer_Blank_Symbol_Wheel_New.stl

as the base model for all four customized wheels.

The dimensions, tolerances, clearances and all mechanical interfaces shall remain identical to the original part.

The lettering shall be oriented so that it appears upright when viewed from outside while the puzzle box is standing upright.

Example:

When the character A is viewed from the front, the base of the A points toward the wheel center.

If this font cannot be reproduced reliably in CAD, a visually similar serif font may be used after approval.

Printability Requirements

The lettering shall be optimized for FDM printing using a 0.4 mm nozzle.

Recommended design limits:

engraved depth ≥ 0.8 mm
minimum stroke width ≥ 0.6 mm
minimum feature width ≥ 0.8 mm
minimum spacing between strokes ≥ 0.5 mm

Minor adjustments to individual letters are acceptable if required for reliable printing.

5. Task B – Top Decoration (Core_Decoration)

Modify the existing Core_Decoration.stl with a personalized version.

The overall geometry shall remain circular and maintain the original external dimensions and mechanical interfaces so it fits the existing assembly without modification.

Within this circular element, create a large three-dimensional heart.

The heart should:

be smoothly integrated into the circular design,
occupy as much of the available area as practical,
appear elegant and premium,
become the dominant visual feature.

The following text shall be engraved into the heart:

ANJA & MARKUS

Requirements:

centered
balanced layout
elegant appearance
clearly readable
optimized for FDM printing

The heart should appear integrated into the overall circular ornament rather than simply placed on top of it.

The overall appearance should be timeless, elegant simple and suitable as a high-quality personalized gift.

6. Task C – Decorative Theme

Replace selected alchemical or mystical decorative elements with a romantic interpretation.

Possible design elements include:

hearts
intertwined lines
vines
leaves
roses
infinity symbols
subtle floral ornaments

These examples are intentionally provided as inspiration rather than strict requirements.

The artistic interpretation is part of the designer's creative contribution.

The finished appearance should remain:

elegant
tasteful
sophisticated
premium
suitable for adults

Avoid:

cartoon hearts
childish decorations
excessive Valentine's clichés
overly ornate Victorian styling

The puzzle should still primarily appear as an elegant mysterious puzzle box with subtle romantic elements.

7. Task D – Additional False Keypaths

Increase the puzzle complexity.

Use the existing

Inner_Wheel_New.stl

as the starting point and see how false keyways look like in Inner_Wheel_With_False_Keyway.stl (Inner_Wheel_With_False_Keyway.stl has the false connector)

MAKE SURE THE CONNECTOR MATCHES THE 8 SIDED Outer WHEEL Slot 


Requirements:

preserve one correct keypath
add four additional false keypaths
total:
1 true keypath
4 false keypaths

False keypaths should:

initially feel plausible
allow limited movement
stop before the puzzle opens
not permanently jam
not damage the mechanism
preserve the reliability of the puzzle
8. Design Freedom

The mechanical modifications described in this specification should be implemented precisely.

For the decorative redesign, however, the designer is encouraged to contribute creatively.

The listed decorative elements should be considered inspiration rather than exact templates.

Creative freedom is encouraged provided:

the romantic theme is preserved,
the design remains elegant,
printability is maintained,
mechanical functionality is unchanged,
personalization requirements are fulfilled.

Before final modeling, please provide one or two rendered design concepts for approval.

9. Printing Requirements

The finished parts shall be suitable for FDM printing.

Target assumptions:

PLA
0.4 mm nozzle
0.2 mm layer height

Avoid unnecessarily fine details that may reduce print quality.

10. Deliverables

Please provide:

Printable Files
STL files for all modified components
3MF project files (preferred if available)
Editable CAD Files

Preferred:

Fusion 360 (.f3d)

Alternative:

STEP
FreeCAD source files
Documentation
assembly notes (if modifications affect assembly)
recommended print orientation
recommended print settings

12. Acceptance Criteria
Mechanical
Puzzle assembles without modification.
All parts fit correctly.
Wheels rotate smoothly.
Original puzzle functionality is preserved.
Correct combination can be configured during assembly.
Exactly one functional keypath exists.
Four false keypaths function correctly.
False keypaths cannot accidentally open the puzzle.
False keypaths do not jam or permanently lock the mechanism.
Printability
All STL files are manifold.
All STL files slice successfully without repair.
Parts are optimized for FDM printing using a 0.4 mm nozzle.
Decorative details print reliably.
Engraved lettering remains clearly legible after printing.
Personalization
Wheel lettering exactly matches the supplied specification.
Letter orientation follows the specified upright alignment.
The top decoration contains the engraved text "ANJA & MARKUS".
The heart is integrated into the circular top decoration.
Decorative redesign follows the agreed romantic style.
The overall appearance is elegant and visually consistent.
Deliverables

13. Out of Scope

Unless separately agreed, this project does not include:
redesigning the core puzzle mechanics beyond the specified false keypaths,
creating additional puzzle variants,
optimizing specifically for resin printing,
creating multi-material or multi-color versions,
physical test printing or assembly by the designer,
modifications to parts not listed in this specification.

Milestone	Deliverables	Payment
1. Design Proposal & Concept Approval	
Review of the original model, confirmation of technical feasibility, implementation plan, identification of the files to be modified, and one or two rendered design concepts for the personalized top decoration and decorative theme.	10%
2. Mechanical Modifications	
Printable STL files and editable CAD files for the four customized wheels and the modified Inner_Wheel_With_False_Keyway containing 1 true and 4 false keypaths. Preliminary renderings demonstrating the modified parts.	35%
3. Decorative Modifications	
Printable STL files and editable CAD files for the personalized Core_Decoration and all modified decorative components. High-quality rendered preview images of the completed decorative parts.	35%
4. Final Delivery Package	
Final STL files, editable CAD files (Fusion 360 preferred, STEP acceptable), optional 3MF files, organized project files, assembly notes (if required), recommended print settings, and incorporation of all agreed review comments from the previous milestones.	20%

title: WordPress Blog Relaunch Design Stadt-Entwicklungsspirale
description:
Mein Blog Entwicklungsspirale.de liegt bereits auf einem frisch eingerichteten Alfahosting-Server und wartet auf einen Neuanfang. Inhaltlich bewege ich mich im Feld der Integralen Theorie nach Ken Wilber sowie Spiral Dynamics, künftig mit einem klaren Fokus auf kommunale Anwendungen und einem offenen Blick auf weltweite Entwicklungen. 

Dafür suche ich professionelle Unterstützung bei der kompletten Neugestaltung der WordPress-Seite auf Basis des bisherigen Brandings (siehe Archivansicht: https://web.archive.org/web/20260000000000*/entwicklungsspirale.de). Mir ist wichtig, dass das Resultat modern und minimalistisch wirkt, ohne die inhaltliche Tiefe zu verlieren.

Kernanforderungen 
• Neues Theme oder Child-Theme im modernen, minimalistischen Look 
• Kommentarfunktion und Newsletter-Anmeldung sauber integriert (gerne mit DSGVO-konformen Tools wie MailPoet, Mailchimp o. Ä.) 
• Startseite, die ausgewählte Schlüsselbeiträge prominent hervorhebt, während Archiv und Kategorien übersichtlich zugänglich bleiben 
• Saubere Migration bzw. Einbindung der alten Inhalte, sofern sinnvoll 
• Vorbereitung auf spätere Erweiterungen wie Crowdfunding-Module und mehrsprachige Inhalte 

Ich freue mich auf kreative, praktikable Vorschläge zum UX-Konzept, zur Informationsarchitektur und zu Performance-Optimierungen speziell unter Alfahosting. Bitte skizziere kurz deinen Ansatz, verwendete Plugins oder Page-Builder sowie einen realistischen Zeitrahmen für einen ersten klickbaren Prototyp.

title: Build WordPress Website with Kadence & Gutenberg
description:
# Kadence and Gutenberg Expert for Multilingual Corporate Website Framework

We are looking for an experienced WordPress developer and web designer to create the technical, structural and visual framework for a new version of our corporate website:

https://www.seil-frey.com

Seil-Frey GmbH is a German manufacturer of ropes, nets and technical safety solutions.

The goal is not to copy the existing website, but to create a modern, fast, responsive and maintainable WordPress foundation that preserves the recognizable Seil-Frey identity while improving design, structure, performance and usability.

## Main project scope

The freelancer will create the complete technical and design framework, including:

* WordPress and Kadence setup
* Kadence Child Theme
* global colors, typography and spacing
* clean CSS architecture
* reusable Gutenberg patterns
* selected Kadence Blocks where useful
* responsive navigation, header and footer
* hero sections
* galleries
* image-and-text sections
* tables
* buttons
* contact and download sections
* multilingual infrastructure
* Yoast SEO setup
* performance optimization
* documentation and handover

The freelancer is not expected to enter and format all final website content.

After the framework is completed, the website will be handed over to another person who will add, structure and translate most of the content.

The system must therefore be easy to understand and maintain without programming knowledge.

## Existing website

The current website should be used as the basis for:

* corporate identity and color concept
* navigation structure
* page types
* representative content
* existing URLs and SEO structure

The freelancer should analyze the website and propose a clearer and more modern structure.

Enough representative content should be transferred to create complete sample pages and reusable templates. The remaining content will later be entered by the content editor.

Please quote separately for:

1. creation of the complete framework and sample pages
2. optional transfer of additional existing content

## Technical approach

The website should be built with:

* WordPress Gutenberg
* Kadence Theme
* Kadence Child Theme
* native WordPress blocks
* reusable Gutenberg patterns
* carefully selected Kadence Blocks
* centralized CSS classes
* global design settings

We do not want:

* Elementor
* Divi
* WPBakery
* proprietary page builders
* excessive plugin usage
* excessive inline CSS
* duplicated styles
* unnecessarily complex page structures

Kadence Blocks should be used sparingly and only where they provide a clear benefit.

## Code and CSS quality

Code quality is a central requirement.

The website must include:

* clean semantic HTML
* maintainable CSS
* clearly named CSS classes
* reusable global styles
* minimal inline styling
* minimal CSS duplication
* no unnecessary JavaScript
* no unused libraries
* no excessive DOM nesting
* clean child-theme structure
* fully responsive layouts

The most important styles should be implemented through reusable CSS classes or global WordPress/Kadence settings, including:

* headings
* paragraphs
* links
* buttons
* colors
* typography
* spacing
* containers
* columns
* images
* galleries
* tables
* forms
* mobile behavior

The CSS structure and naming system must be documented.

## Design requirements

The design should be:

* modern
* clear
* professional
* technical
* visually calm
* suitable for an industrial company
* easy to navigate
* fully responsive

The color concept should be based on the existing Seil-Frey website.

## Reusable components

The freelancer should create reusable blocks, patterns or templates for:

* desktop and mobile navigation
* header and footer
* hero section
* page introduction
* image gallery
* text with image
* image with text
* product and service sections
* technical information sections
* responsive tables
* call-to-action sections
* contact sections
* download sections
* buttons
* content columns
* references or project sections

These elements must be reusable without copying complex structures or writing new custom code.

## Responsive design

All elements must work correctly on desktop, laptop, tablet and mobile.

Navigation, galleries, tables, columns, images, buttons and text sections must be adapted intelligently for smaller screens.

## Performance

The website must be optimized for speed and good Core Web Vitals.

This includes:

* optimized images
* modern image formats where suitable
* responsive images
* lazy loading
* reduced CSS and JavaScript
* minimal plugin usage
* locally hosted fonts
* no unnecessary external scripts
* clean HTML structure
* caching preparation

The website should be tested on desktop and mobile.

## Multilingual system with AI-assisted translation

The freelancer must recommend and configure a professional multilingual solution that supports AI-assisted translation.

Possible solutions include:

* WPML with automatic translation
* TranslatePress with automatic translation
* Polylang with a suitable AI workflow
* another professional solution

The system should support:

* multiple languages
* translated pages, posts and menus
* translated reusable blocks
* translated SEO titles and descriptions
* translated image descriptions
* correct language URLs
* hreflang
* additional languages in the future
* AI-generated draft translations
* manual review and correction
* human approval before publication

Preferred workflow:

1. create or update the source-language page
2. generate a draft translation using AI
3. review and correct the translation
4. approve and publish it

The freelancer must explain:

* recommended multilingual tool
* AI translation provider
* expected ongoing costs
* where translations are stored
* whether translations remain editable
* how source-content changes are handled
* how SEO metadata is translated
* which external services receive content
* how GDPR requirements are considered

All licenses, accounts and translation credits must be owned by Seil-Frey GmbH.

## Yoast SEO

Install and configure Yoast SEO, including:

* titles and meta descriptions
* XML sitemap
* robots settings
* canonical URLs
* multilingual SEO compatibility
* breadcrumbs if used
* structured data basics
* noindex rules
* preservation of existing URLs where reasonable
* 301 redirects where URLs change

## GDPR and privacy

The website must be suitable for German and European data-protection requirements.

Important requirements:

* locally hosted fonts
* no external Google Fonts
* no Google Analytics
* no unnecessary tracking
* no unnecessary external connections
* privacy-friendly external content
* privacy-compliant contact forms
* documentation of external requests and services

## Handover

After completion, the framework will be handed over to an internal content editor.

The freelancer must provide:

* explanation of website structure
* explanation of Kadence and global design settings
* explanation of CSS classes
* explanation of reusable patterns
* instructions for creating pages
* instructions for images, galleries and tables
* instructions for translations and AI translation
* instructions for SEO metadata
* plugin and license list
* backup and update instructions
* documentation of all custom code

At least one recorded online training session must be included.

As part of final acceptance, the content editor should be able to create a page, use the prepared patterns and generate an AI-assisted translation.

Any usability problems found during this test must be corrected before acceptance.

## Development process

The work should be completed in a staging environment.

Suggested phases:

1. review the existing website
2. propose improved information architecture
3. create design concept
4. define global styles
5. set up child theme and CSS system
6. create header, navigation and footer
7. create reusable components
8. create sample pages
9. configure multilingual functionality
10. configure AI translation
11. configure Yoast SEO
12. optimize performance
13. test responsiveness
14. document and train
15. hand over the framework

## Ownership

All custom code, CSS, patterns, templates, designs and documentation become the property of Seil-Frey GmbH after payment.

All accounts and licenses must be registered to Seil-Frey GmbH.

The freelancer must not leave personal license keys, inaccessible accounts, hidden fees, undocumented code or permanent technical dependencies.

## Required experience

Please apply only if you have proven experience with:

* Kadence Theme and Kadence Blocks
* WordPress Gutenberg
* child themes
* custom CSS
* responsive WordPress development
* multilingual websites
* AI-assisted translation workflows
* Yoast SEO
* website migration
* performance optimization
* documentation and handover

General WordPress or Elementor experience alone is not sufficient.

## Application requirements

Please begin your application with:

**Kadence Gutenberg**

Please provide:

1. at least three live Kadence/Gutenberg websites
2. your exact contribution to each website
3. your approach to CSS architecture and reusable patterns
4. your multilingual experience
5. your recommended multilingual tool and AI workflow
6. expected ongoing translation costs
7. proposed project phases and duration
8. fixed-price proposal
9. separate price for optional content transfer
10. confirmation that you will personally perform the work
11. confirmation that documentation and training are included

Generic WordPress applications without specific Kadence references will not be considered.

## Initial paid test task

Before awarding the full project, we may commission a paid test task, including:

* Kadence Child Theme setup
* global colors and typography
* responsive header
* hero section
* reusable text-and-image section
* responsive table
* documentation of the CSS classes used

The quality and maintainability of this test task will be used to select the freelancer.

title: 100k German Corporate Leads
description:
## B2B Lead Generation Specialist Needed – 100,000 Verified Leads in Germany

We are looking for an experienced B2B Lead Generation and Company Research Specialist to build a high-quality database of approximately 100,000 verified business leads in Germany.

The project must be completed using professional lead generation platforms such as Dealfront or Cognism, combined with manual research and verification.

### Project Scope

The freelancer will:

* Identify relevant companies located in Germany
* Find the appropriate decision-makers and business contacts within each company
* Use Dealfront, Cognism, or comparable professional lead generation tools
* Manually review and verify the collected information
* Remove duplicate, incomplete, outdated, or irrelevant leads
* Organize all leads in a clean Excel or Google Sheets file

### Required Lead Information

Each lead should contain as much of the following information as possible:

* First name
* Last name
* Job title
* Department
* Company name
* Company website
* Industry
* Company size or number of employees
* City
* Postal code
* German federal state
* Business email address
* Direct business telephone number
* General company telephone number
* LinkedIn profile URL
* Company LinkedIn URL
* Source of the information

### Target Contacts

We are primarily interested in decision-makers, including:

* Company owners
* Founders and co-founders
* Managing directors
* CEOs
* CFOs
* HR directors
* Marketing directors
* CSR and sustainability managers
* Corporate communications managers
* Partnership managers
* Other senior decision-makers

### Quality Requirements

The database must meet the following requirements:

* Companies and contacts must be located in Germany
* Leads must be relevant to the agreed target group
* Email addresses should be professionally verified
* Telephone numbers should be checked whenever possible
* No duplicate contacts or companies
* No fake, automatically generated, or outdated information
* Consumer or private contact information should not be included
* Data must come from legitimate professional or publicly available business sources
* The work must follow applicable GDPR and data-protection requirements

We are not looking for a freelancer who simply exports a large unverified list from a database. Manual verification and quality control are essential parts of this project.

### Project Process

The project will be completed in stages.

The selected freelancer must first provide a test sample of 100 leads. We will review the sample for:

* Accuracy
* Relevance
* Data completeness
* Email validity
* Telephone-number quality
* Duplicate rate

After approval of the test sample, the project may continue in larger milestones, for example:

* Milestone 1: 5,000 verified leads
* Milestone 2: 20,000 verified leads
* Milestone 3: 25,000 verified leads
* Milestone 4: 50,000 verified leads

The final target is approximately 100,000 verified leads.

### Required Experience

Applicants should have proven experience with:

* B2B lead generation
* Company research
* Contact list building
* Dealfront
* Cognism
* LinkedIn research
* Email verification tools
* Excel or Google Sheets
* German business databases
* Manual lead verification
* Data cleaning and duplicate removal

Knowledge of the German market and the ability to understand German company information are important advantages.

### When Applying, Please Answer the Following Questions

1. Have you previously completed a lead generation project involving more than 50,000 leads?
2. Do you currently have active access to Dealfront, Cognism, or another professional B2B database?
3. Which email and telephone verification tools do you use?
4. How will you manually verify the leads?
5. How many verified leads can you deliver per week?
6. What accuracy rate can you guarantee?
7. How do you identify and remove duplicate contacts?
8. Can you provide a sample of 100 leads before starting the full project?
9. What is your total price for 100,000 verified leads?
10. Please provide examples of similar projects without sharing confidential client information.

### Important

Please do not apply if you intend to provide scraped, outdated, duplicated, or unverified data.

We are looking for a reliable long-term freelancer who can deliver accurate and well-organized business leads through a combination of professional software and careful manual verification.
