title: Bulk YouTube To MP3 Conversion
description:
I’ve got more than five-hundred videos saved from a recent YouTube Premium trial and I need each of them turned into an individual MP3. Standard quality (128 kbps) is all I’m after, so there’s no need for lossless or 320 kbps processing. 

You don’t have to worry about sorting; one big folder is fine as long as every track keeps the original video title in the file name. I’ll share a list of URLs (or the offline files themselves, whichever you prefer) and I’m happy to supply them in batches so you can keep the workflow smooth. 

Please use any reliable toolchain you’re comfortable with—youtube-dl / yt-dlp, FFmpeg, or similar—as long as the end result is clean audio without clipping or noticeable artefacts.

Deliverable: 
• 500+ MP3 files encoded at 128 kbps, packaged in a single archive or cloud folder link. 

I need them in the 2 days!

title: WordPress Betheme Nonprofit Site Build
description:
We are a registered non-profit human rights organization looking for an experienced WordPress developer to build a modern, secure, and professional website from scratch.

Important

The website should be developed using Betheme and its native BeBuilder page builder.

We do not want Elementor unless there is a compelling technical reason. We prefer to use Betheme's built-in tools to ensure better performance, easier maintenance, and long-term stability.

What We Are Looking For

We are looking for a developer who:

Is highly experienced with WordPress.
Has extensive experience using Betheme and BeBuilder.
Can recommend the most suitable Betheme pre-built website for our organization.
Can customize Betheme professionally to create a unique and modern design.
Has strong UI/UX design skills.
Can build a fast, secure, and mobile-friendly website.
Has experience with non-profit or fundraising websites.
Can integrate donation/payment systems.
Can provide ongoing support after launch.
Website Features

The website should include:

Home Page
About Us
Our Mission
Human Rights Campaigns
News & Articles
Blog
Donation Pages
Contact Page
Newsletter Signup
Social Media Integration
Search Function
Call-to-Action sections throughout the site
Technical Requirements

The developer should:

Build the website using Betheme and BeBuilder.
Configure the website for easy editing by non-technical users.
Optimize loading speed and Core Web Vitals.
Implement WordPress security best practices.
Configure automatic backups.
Set up SEO (Rank Math or Yoast SEO).
Configure Google Analytics and Google Search Console.
Ensure full responsiveness for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
Configure SSL.
Set up contact forms.
Integrate Stripe and PayPal donation/payment gateways.
Assist with connecting the payment system to our bank account.
Test all website functionality before launch.
Migrate the completed website to our live domain.
Fix any bugs after launch.
Design

We want a clean, modern, trustworthy, and professional website suitable for an international human rights organization.

The design should inspire trust, encourage donations, and be easy to navigate.

Deliverables
Complete WordPress website.
Betheme installation and configuration.
Fully customized BeBuilder pages.
Responsive design.
Donation/payment integration.
SEO-ready structure.
Security configuration.

title: WordPress-Outlook Digital Group Booking System
description:
Located in Germany (native speaker is a plus)
# Development of a Digital Group Booking Process Using WordPress and Outlook

## 1. Project Objective

The objective of this project is to implement a structured digital workflow for group bookings through the climbing gym's existing WordPress website.

Groups should be able to submit a complete booking request through an online form. Each request will then be reviewed internally and either approved or declined by a staff member.

Only after manual approval should the system automatically create a booking in the gym's Microsoft Outlook calendar.

The solution should achieve the following objectives:

* Collect all relevant group information in a structured way.
* Reduce phone calls and email communication.
* Ensure an internal review before confirming any booking.
* Prevent double bookings and overbooking.
* Automatically create Outlook calendar entries for confirmed bookings.
* Maintain a complete record of all booking requests.
* Verify instructor qualifications and parental consent forms before the visit.
* Reduce administrative workload for reception and office staff.

---

# 2. Overall Process

The proposed workflow is:

**Group submits booking request through WordPress**

↓

**Booking request is stored**

↓

**Automatic confirmation of receipt is sent**

↓

**Internal review**

↓

**Manual approval or rejection**

↓

**Automatic creation or update of the Outlook calendar entry**

A booking only becomes binding after it has been manually approved by an authorized employee.

Submitting the online form represents a booking request only and does **not** reserve the requested date automatically.

---

# 3. Systems Involved

## WordPress

WordPress serves as the public interface for customers.

The website will be used to:

* collect all booking information
* request preferred dates and times
* upload instructor certificates
* display booking conditions and safety information
* provide or link parental consent forms
* send automatic confirmation emails

---

## WordPress Form Plugin

A professional form plugin is required to build the booking process.

Suitable options include:

* Gravity Forms
* Fluent Forms
* Formidable Forms
* WPForms

The selected plugin should support at least:

* required fields
* conditional logic
* file uploads
* automated emails
* GDPR consent
* multi-page forms
* unique booking reference numbers
* API or webhook integration
* data transfer to external systems

---

## Microsoft 365 / Power Automate

Microsoft Power Automate will connect WordPress with Microsoft 365 and automate the business workflow.

Typical tasks include:

* receiving booking data from WordPress
* storing requests in Microsoft Lists
* notifying the responsible staff members
* updating booking status
* creating Outlook calendar appointments after approval
* sending confirmations or rejection emails
* sending reminder emails
* checking calendar conflicts

Alternative automation platforms such as Make or Zapier could also be used, although Power Automate is the preferred option due to the existing Microsoft 365 environment.

---

## Microsoft Lists

Microsoft Lists will act as the internal booking database.

Every booking request should be stored together with its current processing status.

Suggested status values include:

* New Request
* Under Review
* Customer Follow-up Required
* Missing Documents
* Provisionally Reserved
* Confirmed
* Declined
* Cancelled
* Completed

---

## Microsoft Outlook

Outlook will serve as the official operational calendar for confirmed group bookings.

Unapproved booking requests should either:

* not appear in Outlook at all, or
* be shown as provisional internal reservations using a dedicated category.

The recommended approach is to create the final Outlook appointment only after manual approval.

---

## GymRealm

Since the climbing gym already uses GymRealm, the implementation should first determine whether confirmed group bookings also need to be synchronized with GymRealm.

The following questions should be clarified:

* Should GymRealm remain the primary booking system?
* Does GymRealm provide an API or integration interface?
* Can group bookings be imported automatically?
* Can GymRealm create Outlook calendar appointments?
* Should participant numbers and revenue be stored there?
* Does GymRealm already include capacity or resource management?

Duplicate manual data entry into both Outlook and GymRealm should be avoided whenever possible.

---

# 4. Online Group Booking Form

The booking form should be divided into several clear and user-friendly steps.

## Step 1 – Contact Information

Required fields:

* Organisation or group name
* Group type
* Responsible contact person
* Email address
* Telephone number
* Billing address (if required)
* Alternative contact person for the day of the visit

Suggested group categories:

* School
* Kindergarten
* Sports Club
* Youth Group
* Social Organisation
* Company
* Private Group
* Birthday Party
* Other

---

## Step 2 – Requested Booking

Required fields:

* Preferred date
* Preferred start time
* Planned duration
* Optional alternative date
* Requested activity
* Estimated arrival time

Available activities:

* Bouldering
* Rope Climbing
* Combination of Bouldering and Rope Climbing
* Instructor-led Session
* Self-supervised Group

The booking form should clearly state that the requested date is **not confirmed until reviewed and approved by the climbing gym**.

title: Debian Touchscreen Terminal App
description:
Ich plane eine App für ein Debian-basiertes Touchscreen-Terminal. Die Anwendung soll eine interaktive Steuerung ermöglichen und dabei hauptsächlich Textinformationen anzeigen. Über eine gesicherte Verbindung muss sie fortlaufend mit einem Backend-Server bzw. einer Cloud-API kommunizieren, um Befehle zu senden, Statusmeldungen zu empfangen und Konfigurationsdaten zu synchronisieren.

Was ich mir vorstelle 
• Eine schlanke Desktop-Anwendung (kein reines Kommandozeilentool), optimiert für Touch-Eingaben unter Debian/Linux. 
• Klare, gut lesbare Oberflächen in Vollbild-Kiosk-Manier. 
• Reibungslose Kommunikation zu meinem bestehenden REST- oder WebSocket-Backend – Latenzarm und fehlertolerant. 
• Automatische Wiederverbindung bei Netzunterbrechung. 
• Protokollierung wichtiger Ereignisse (Log-Dateien). 

Technologien & Tools (Vorschlag, offen für Alternativen) 
• Python, Qt (PyQt / PySide) oder Electron für die GUI. 
• libcurl, Requests oder aiohttp für die Netzwerk­schicht. 
• Systemd-Service oder ähnliches, damit die App nach dem Boot direkt startet.

Lieferumfang 
1. Funktionsfähiger Quellcode inklusive Build-/Deploy-Anleitung. 
2. Kurze README zur Einrichtung auf einem frischen Debian-System. 
3. Ein erster Testlauf, bei dem die App Texte vom Demo-Backend abruft und einfache Steuerbefehle zurückmeldet. 
4. Falls möglich: Script oder Paket, das alle Abhängigkeiten automatisch installiert.

Zusätzliche Anforderungen: Die App wurde über einen Zeitraum von sechs Monaten entwickelt und benötigt nun Unterstützung bei der Erstellung eines Debian-Images sowie bei der Behebung verbleibender Fehler unter Verwendung eines spezifischen Debian-Toolkits für ein chinesisches Touchscreen-Terminal.

• Bild-SEO, strukturierte Daten und Content-Anpassungen zur Steigerung der Relevanz.

Offpage-Aufgaben
• Analyse unseres bestehenden Backlinkprofils, anschließend gezielter Linkaufbau über thematisch passende Quellen und Branchenverzeichnisse.

Ergänzend erwarte ich:
• Einrichtung und Pflege des Google Business Profils für Local SEO.
• Monatliches Reporting mit klaren KPIs sowie einer nachvollziehbaren Dokumentation sämtlicher Maßnahmen.
• Kontinuierliche Beratung, um neu auftretende Chancen oder Google-Updates zeitnah zu berücksichtigen.

title: Laufende WordPress-Unterstützung gesucht
description:
Ich betreibe zwei WordPress-Seiten – eine im Avada-, die andere im Divi-Theme – und möchte sie schrittweise optimieren. Dafür suche ich jemanden, der mich stundenweise und flexibel unterstützt, sobald neue Aufgaben anstehen.

– Kommunikation läuft bevorzugt per E-Mail oder Telefon, kleine Abstimmungen gern per Zoom.

title: Cinematic Retreat Promo Video
description:
I’m preparing the launch campaign for “One Retreat – Yoga & Sailing Week” in Corfu and need a cinematic brand piece that immediately transports viewers into the calm flow of sunrise yoga on deck, gentle Aegean breezes in the sails, and the slow-motion serenity of life at sea. The primary objective is to promote the retreat, so every second of screen time has to make people want to book their spot.

# Creative Brief – Cinematic Brand Video & Social Shorts
## One Retreat – Yoga & Sailing Week | Corfu, Greece

### Objective
Create an emotional, cinematic brand film that makes people feel what this retreat is like rather than simply showing what happens.

The video should inspire viewers to think:
"I want to be there."

The focus is on freedom, connection, nature, wellbeing and unforgettable moments aboard a luxury catamaran in the Ionian Islands.

---

# Deliverables

## 1. Hero Film
Length: 2–3 minutes

Format:
* YouTube
* Website Hero Video

---

## 2. Social Content

Create 15–25 short edits from the main footage.

Formats:
* Instagram Reels
* TikTok
* Facebook Reels
* YouTube Shorts
* Stories (9:16)
* Square versions where useful

Length:
10–45 seconds

---

# Overall Feeling

The film should feel like:

Luxury without being pretentious.

Natural.

Elegant.

Authentic.

Warm.

Human.

Peaceful.

Joyful.

Emotional.

Think:
White Lotus meets Patagonia meets luxury sailing documentary.

No staged influencer content.

Real emotions.

---

# Visual Style

Golden hour

Soft morning light

Crystal-clear turquoise water

Deep blue sea

Slow motion mixed with dynamic drone shots

Natural camera movement

Handheld close-ups

Beautiful cinematic color grading

Premium documentary style

---

# Main Story

This is not about a yoga retreat.

It is about a journey.

People arrive as strangers.

They leave as friends.

The sea becomes home.

Every day offers a new island, a new bay and a new experience.

---

# Characters

Small international group

Approximately six guests

Preferably mostly women

Age:
30–55

Mix of solo travellers and friends

Natural diversity

No models

Real people

---

# Emotions to Capture

Laughter

Big smiles

Deep conversations

Eye contact

Hugs

Friendship

Freedom

Excitement

Wonder

Calmness

Peace

Joy

Adventure

Connection

---

# Key Experiences

Luxury catamaran sailing

Exploring the Ionian Islands

Swimming in turquoise water

Jumping from the catamaran

Relaxing on the nets

Morning coffee on deck

Sunrise yoga

Meditation

Sound healing at sunset

Breathing exercises

Reading on deck

Sharing brunch together

Dinner in authentic Greek harbour restaurants

Walking through beautiful harbour villages

Discovering hidden beaches

SUP boarding

Snorkelling

Helping sail the catamaran

Learning basic sailing

Watching dolphins if available

Sunsets at sea

Starry nights

Morning swims

Laughing together

Cooking together where appropriate

Celebrating life

---

# Must-Have Shots

Drone flying around the catamaran

Catamaran sailing with full sails

Close-up of hands touching the water

Feet walking barefoot on deck

Wind in the hair

People laughing together

Friends hugging

Group enjoying dinner in a Greek harbour

Local seafood and Mediterranean dishes

Greek tavern atmosphere

Wine glasses clinking

Fresh fruit

Morning yoga on the front deck

Sound healing with crystal bowls

Meditation overlooking the sea

Woman jumping into the water

Swimming around the boat

Reading in a hammock/net

Beautiful anchorages

Harbour arrivals

Walking through white Greek streets

Sunset silhouettes

Night sky

Captain steering

Sails opening

Sea spray

Smiles

Authentic candid moments

---

# Locations

Corfu

Paxos

Antipaxos

Hidden bays

Small Greek harbours

Traditional tavernas

Crystal-clear beaches

Open sea

Luxury catamaran

---

# Brand Values

Freedom

Community

Adventure

Mindfulness

Luxury

Nature

Connection

Slow living

Authenticity

Transformation

Joy

---

# Music

Emotional cinematic soundtrack

Organic percussion

Soft piano

Ambient electronic elements

Mediterranean influences

Build slowly

Strong emotional climax

End with a peaceful feeling

---

# Editing Style

Slow emotional storytelling

Beautiful pacing

Mix of cinematic wide shots and intimate close-ups

Natural sound design

Ocean sounds

Wind

Laughter

# Brand Message

This is more than a holiday.

It is a week that reconnects people with nature, with others and with themselves.

---

Escape the ordinary.

Join us in the Ionian Islands.

One Retreat.

Sail. Breathe. Connect

title: Wissenschaftlich-Künstlerische Publikation Begleitung
description:
Leistungsbeschreibung: Konzeption, editorielle Begleitung und Gestaltung einer wissenschaftlich-künstlerischen Publikation zur Geschichte der Graduiertenschule an der Universität der Künste Berlin (Berlin Centre for Advanced Studies in Arts and Sciences)

Gesucht wird ein Angebot für die konzeptionelle, editorielle und gestalterische Begleitung einer zweisprachigen Publikation (Deutsch/Englisch), die auf Interviewmaterial, Archivdokumenten und wissenschaftlich-künstlerischer Forschung basiert.

Projektziel
Entwicklung einer druckfertigen Publikation, die unterschiedliche Text- und Bildmaterialien zu einer kohärenten narrativen und gestalterischen Einheit zusammenführt. Die Publikation soll sowohl editoriell als auch gestalterisch entwickelt und bis zur Druckvorbereitung begleitet werden.

Leistungsumfang
1. Konzeption und editorielle Begleitung
•	Analyse und Sichtung des vorhandenen Materials 
•	Unterstützung bei der Strukturierung und Organisation der Inhalte 
•	Entwicklung einer inhaltlichen und narrativen Publikationsstruktur 
•	Redaktionelle Beratung während des Entwicklungsprozesses 
•	Regelmäßige Abstimmungstermine während der Projektlaufzeit 

2. Editorial Design
•	Entwicklung eines Gestaltungskonzepts 
•	Entwicklung eines Layout- und Gestaltungssystems 
•	Gestaltung von Umschlag und Innenteil 
•	Integration und Aufbereitung von Bild- und Archivmaterial 
•	Erstellung von Prototypen bzw. Layoutentwürfen 

3. Layout und Produktionsvorbereitung
•	Satz und Layout der vollständigen Publikation 
•	Überarbeitung bis zur Druckreife 
•	Erstellung druckfähiger Daten 
•	Unterstützung bei produktionstechnischen Entscheidungen 
•	Abstimmung mit der Druckerei (optional) 
Voraussichtlicher Projektablauf
•	Phase 1: Konzeption, Materialsichtung und Strukturentwicklung 
•	Phase 2: Gestaltungskonzept und Layoutentwicklung 
•	Phase 3: Finalisierung, Druckvorbereitung und Produktionsbegleitung 

Geplanter Zeitrahmen
Juli bis November 2026

Geplante Publikation
•	Format: ca. A5 
•	Umfang: ca. 180–240 Seiten 
•	Sprache: Deutsch/Englisch 
•	Auflage: ca. 250–350 Exemplare 
•	Druck: Fadenheftung, Softcover oder Hardcover (noch festzulegen) 

Nicht Bestandteil des Auftrags
•	Druckkosten 
•	Übersetzungen 
•	Externes Lektorat/Proofreading 
•	Erstellung neuer Illustrationen oder Fotografien 
•	Erwerb von Bildrechten 
•	Organisation einer öffentlichen Präsentation

title: FAA Experimental Aircraft Annual Inspection
description:
I have an N-registered, experimental, fixed-wing two-seater based in North-Rhine Westphalia, Germany, and it is time for the annual condition inspection required under 14 CFR §91.319(b). I need an FAA-certified inspector (A&P with IA, or DAR qualified to perform condition inspections) who can visit the aircraft on site, carry out the inspection in accordance with AC 43.13 and Appendix D of Part 43, and then make the proper logbook entries to return it to service.

A full narrative report is not necessary; the standard checklist and signed logbook entry will be sufficient for my records and for continuing airworthiness. All maintenance manuals, previous logbooks, and the equipment list will be available on the day.

Deliverables 
• Physical condition inspection completed on site 
• Logbook entry and FAA-compliant sign-off 

The airplane is hangared with good access to tools and power; please let me know your earliest availability and any equipment you would like me to have ready before you arrive.

title: Invoice Formatting & Graphic Updates
description:

Please keep the file in an editable Word format and also export a print-ready PDF once all changes are approved. I will share the template, logo files (PNG and SVG), and the exact copy updates as soon as we start.

• All requested text edits are in place. 
• Logos/graphics appear crisp, correctly sized, and positioned.
